behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (summary writer must query stored per-dimension findings for the same round), not a single pure function. REAL-INFRA: no required real OS/network/subprocess is stated. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no model-output dependence or multi-agent chain in this behavior text. Rejected higher levels because behavior text is only about stored findings consistency, not live agents or external infra.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary-persistence service + findings repository (test DB or in-memory repo with realistic queries). Seed round R with at least one FAIL dimension finding, then attempt to persist PASS summary for round R. Assert write is rejected with explicit error and no PASS summary record is stored.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears when gate logic reads the wrong source across modules (summary text vs findings store). Unit is too low because the failure boundary is source-of-truth wiring. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required by behavior text. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no required model judgment or agent pipeline step.
behaviors.test_description: Run gate service with repository + summary store. Create conflicting state: summary text says all PASS, but stored finding for a dimension is FAIL. Compute stop-gate verdict and assert non-PASS (blocked/fail) based on stored findings, proving summary text is ignored as authority.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: behavior spans request/flag handling plus persistence of audit warning; boundary is inter-module state change. REAL-INFRA: no mandatory real subprocess/network/OS primitive in text. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no model-output correctness required. Rejected System because text requires auditable record, not external logging service semantics.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke summary-finalization path without override flag and with manual override text; assert rejection and no override applied. Re-run with explicit override flag; assert override accepted and an audit-warning record is persisted with actor, timestamp, reason, and round id.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is cross-module temporal consistency (fix-commit metadata vs review-round metadata). REAL-INFRA: behavior text does not require invoking real git subprocess; commit identity can be treated as data contract in-process. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no dependence on model output content is stated. Rejected System because no concrete requirement for real OS/git behavior is in the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Wire fix-tracking metadata module + review-round store + gate finalizer. Seed latest fix commit C2 and an older review round tied to C1; attempt PASS finalize and assert blocked. Seed a newer round tied to C2 (or descendant marker defined by system) and assert PASS eligibility can proceed.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text explicitly says "live review loop" and requires sequencing updated diff -> fresh review-agent round -> PASS finalization, i.e., full agent pipeline execution. MULTI-STEP: multiple stages with agent execution gating final outcome. LLM-DEP: involves real review-agent run; stubs can hide failures where loop marks stale/non-run rounds as fresh. Rejected Integration because behavior is not only infrastructure around a call; it validates end-to-end live loop sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Execute end-to-end live loop: create baseline round, apply fix producing updated diff, then attempt finalize without running a new review-agent round and assert PASS is blocked. Run an actual fresh review-agent round on updated diff, then assert finalization check now evaluates using that new round id/state.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: decision requires interaction of round-budget state and stored MUST-FIX findings across modules. REAL-INFRA: no live OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: correctness here is policy evaluation on stored results, not model output quality. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is about stored unresolved findings at exhaustion, not live agent execution steps.
behaviors.test_description: Wire round-budget tracker + findings repository + decision engine. Seed state: max rounds reached and at least one unresolved MUST-FIX finding. Run outcome computation and assert escalation status is emitted and PASS is impossible.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text explicitly requires "live multi-round review workflow" plus exhaustion handling and escalation emission, which is a sequenced agent pipeline scenario. MULTI-STEP is directly satisfied (multiple rounds/agentic steps). Rejected Integration because the text disqualifies a static stored-state-only check; it requires live multi-round workflow behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real multi-round review workflow over updated diffs until configured round limit is reached while preserving at least one unresolved MUST-FIX in stored findings. Assert final gate blocks PASS and emits escalation event/record at exhaustion in the live workflow path.
